name: brainstorm.addIdea
description: Add a brainstorm idea to the whiteboard as a sticky note, or create a theme frame when kind is set to 'theme'. Useful for agents capturing ideas during brainstorming sessions.

room_id.description: Whiteboard room ID to add the idea to.

idea.description: The idea or theme text to place on the board.

category.description: Optional category for grouping similar ideas.

kind.description: Whether to create a sticky-note idea or a theme frame. Defaults to 'idea'.

connected_ideas.description: Optional list of related ideas when kind is 'theme'.

x.description: Optional X position on canvas. Auto-positioned if omitted.

y.description: Optional Y position on canvas. Auto-positioned if omitted.

project_id.description: Project ID for scoping (optional, uses session).

org_id.description: Organization ID for scoping (optional, uses session).
